title: psoralea lanceolata
intro: Psoralea lanceolata, also known as wolf's bane or lance-leaved psoralea, is a flowering plant in the legume family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat a variety of health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Psoralea lanceolata include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its use in treating conditions such as arthritis, skin diseases, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Psoralea lanceolata can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for consumption, and it is also sometimes used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
